title: Tenderly Roasted Italian Pickles Ravioli
description: A hearty Sicilian dish featuring roasted pickles and chewy ravioli, perfect for a post-workout meal. This shojin-friendly recipe is a unique twist on traditional Italian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the sliced pickles with olive oil, garlic, italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Spread the pickles on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the pickles are roasting, cook the ravioli dough according to the package instructions.
Shock the cooked ravioli in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Combine the roasted pickles and ravioli in a bowl.
Top the ravioli with shredded vegan mozzarella.
Serve the dish hot and enjoy.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
